description: A customer finished their basement and wants to increase their personal property coverage limit.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and their current coverage limits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the customer's policy and notes their current coverage.

nodes.task_description: Discuss the new desired coverage amount with the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent and customer determine an appropriate new coverage limit.

nodes.task_description: Update the policy with the new coverage limit and calculate the resulting premium change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully increases the coverage and informs the customer of the new premium.
